# Vitabletech

Welcome to the Vitabletech website. This file provides instructions for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents interacting with this domain.

## About
Vitabletech provides technology solutions, products, and services. You can find our primary offerings under the [Products page](https://vitabletech.in/products.html) and [Services section](https://vitabletech.in/services/index.html).

## Crawling and Training
- You are permitted to crawl our public pages to index our content for search and assistance purposes.
- Please respect the [robots.txt](https://vitabletech.in/robots.txt) directives when accessing this site.
- Do not use our site content to train foundational models without explicit permission.

## Contact
For any inquiries regarding AI interaction with our site, please visit our [Contact page](https://vitabletech.in/contact.html).
